title: Dynamic Array Reconfiguration: Programmable Atom Connectivity
description: Master the techniques for dynamically rearranging neutral atom arrays to achieve arbitrary connectivity patterns. Learn how atom sorting, shuttling, and real-time reconfiguration enable flexible quantum processor architectures.
learningObjectives: Understand the defect-free array assembly problem and sorting algorithms
Analyze atom transport dynamics including heating and loss mechanisms
Design reconfiguration sequences for target connectivity graphs
Calculate transport fidelity and time budgets for mid-circuit rearrangement
Compare fixed vs reconfigurable architecture trade-offs
